results.title: Phase 1 Wave 3 delivery assets
results.content: Implemented Wave 3 for Phase 1 closure. Added src/minder/server.py as the main app seam that builds the store, transport, and default tool registrations. Added bootstrap and delivery assets: scripts/create_admin.py with tested idempotent admin creation, scripts/seed_skills.py with local skill directory seeding and idempotence coverage, scripts/download_models.sh with skip and checksum behavior, docker/Dockerfile, docker/docker-compose.dev.yml, and GitHub workflows .github/workflows/ci.yml and release.yml. Added docs/PROJECT_PROGRESS.md as the dedicated project progress board and updated docs/TASK_BREAKDOWN.md to link to it. Added tests/integration/test_phase1_wave3_assets.py and verified with uv run ruff check, uv run mypy src, and uv run pytest (94 passed). Tracker status after Wave 3: P1-T22 DONE, P1-T17/P1-T18/P1-T19/P1-T20/P1-T21 PARTIAL pending real runtime execution. Committed as c3d4827 feat: add phase 1 delivery assets.

results.title: Phase 1 task breakdown audit
results.content: Audited docs/TASK_BREAKDOWN.md against the actual minder repository state. Added a Phase 1 implementation audit, a per-task status map, a current runnable local flow section, and an explicit closure checklist. Key finding: Phase 1 is still open despite strong foundation code. Missing or partial areas are MCP transports (SSE/stdio), repo-local .minder state, standalone workflow/memory/auth/session tool modules, bootstrap scripts, docker development stack, GitHub Actions CI/release workflows, and tests/integration/test_phase1_gate.py. Also removed a stale reference to docs/PHASE2_MANUAL_TEST.md because that file does not exist in the workspace.

results.title: Local onboarding docs and port 8800 defaults
results.content: Rewrote the root README as a real documentation entrypoint, added docs/guides/local-setup.md and docs/guides/admin-client-onboarding.md, and switched local dev defaults from port 8080 to 8800 in config, minder.toml, Dockerfile, docker-compose.dev.yml, and generated onboarding templates in src/minder/server.py. The guides are explicit that /dashboard exists but still needs bearer auth because a browser-native admin login form is not implemented yet. Verified with mypy and targeted pytest covering config, delivery assets, phase 4 admin HTTP, and the phase 4 gateway e2e flow.

results.title: packageTourApi docker-compose with local.env
results.content: Created docker-compose.yml with single app service using Dockerfile build and env_file local.env, exposed port 8080:8080, restart unless-stopped. Validated configuration with docker compose config successfully.

results.title: Hardened Minder Docker verification contract
results.content: Continued Phase 2.2 verification by classifying verification failures (docker_unavailable, image_missing, timeout, container_error, unsupported_language), normalizing result contracts, handling subprocess and docker timeouts explicitly, and checking docker image availability before run. Updated verification unit coverage and phase2x integration assertions. Verified with UV_CACHE_DIR=.uv-cache uv run ruff check ., uv run mypy src, and uv run pytest (85 passed).
